name: Microsoft Dataverse / Dynamics 365 (security roles via Entra group team)
status: structure built v2.4.186 -- nested-membership adapter (Entra group -> Dataverse group team -> security role). Live-validation pending a Dataverse environment + the Entra group provisioned as a group team.
permissionsNeeded: Dataverse: a security role with prvReadTeam + prvAssignRole (e.g. System Administrator) for the app user; the Entra group must already exist as a Dataverse GROUP TEAM (teamtype=2)

prerequisites.perRowResource: Each row's Resource column = the Dataverse ENVIRONMENT org host, e.g. contoso.crm4.dynamics.com. baseUrl is token-expanded with it.
prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=dataverse -> the launcher pre-mints $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['dataverse'] for the row's org (resource audience https://{org}); the engine does not mint per-row.
prerequisites.groupTeam: The Entra security group must be provisioned as a Dataverse group team (teamtype=2, azureactivedirectoryobjectid = the group's objectId). resolveContainer finds that team; roles are attached to the team via teamroles_association.
prerequisites.businessUnit: Security roles are business-unit scoped -- listRoles returns roles in the org; pick the one in the team's business unit.
